sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80651" key="pentake/leuqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντᾰ-κέλευθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with five ways</tr_>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:9:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.9.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
